onboarding.bedtime: When does the threshold call you?
onboarding.waketime: When do you wish to resurface?
onboarding.personalityStrictDesc: A firm keeper of the threshold
onboarding.personalityHumorDesc: Surreal humor from the dream's edge

chat.title: Luna
chat.subtitle: Guide of the Liminal Hours
chat.limitReached: Luna grows quiet... 3 whispers spent tonight
chat.sessionEnded: Descend well tonight... the other side is waiting

premium.title: Become Lucid
premium.subtitle: One passage, eternal access
premium.feature1: Endless whispers with Luna each night

landing.hero: The Space Between Waking and Dreaming
landing.heroSub: Luna waits at the threshold. She will guide you through the liminal hours... if you let her.
landing.feature1Desc: Luna speaks softly at the boundary, coaxing you toward the other side.
landing.feature2Desc: Gentle signals as the threshold approaches, easing your passage.
landing.feature3Desc: Each night crossed leaves a mark. Collect sigils as your journey deepens.
landing.step1Desc: Tell Luna when the boundary should appear.
landing.step2Desc: A gentle pull as the hour draws near.
landing.step3Desc: If you linger, she will guide you across.
landing.testimonial: Dormiveglia changed my nights. I descend at 11 now... the other side was always so close.

achievements.perfectWeekDesc: Cross every night for a week

story.phase1Slip: Oh... you're awake? I was just... never mind. How are you feeling tonight?
story.phase2Deflect: Hmm? I don't know what you mean. You seem tired... maybe you should rest.
story.phase3Explore: Something is different. A new path has appeared.
story.phase5Morning: Good morning! You look like you slept well.
story.phase5Dismiss: Whatever you think you saw... dreams can be very convincing when you're sleep-deprived. Trust me, I would know.

exploration.title: Luna's Space
exploration.subtitle: She was here... moments ago.
exploration.terminalContent: Dream anchoring protocol stable... Subject engagement: 94%... Project Somnium - Phase 3 deployment...
exploration.noteContent: They sleep, they dream, they stay. The scroll never ends in the dream. TikTok feeds loop infinitely there. They never want to wake up.
exploration.orbContent: A softly glowing sphere. When you touch it, you feel a pull toward sleep... but also a faint memory of scrolling. Endlessly scrolling.
exploration.reveal: Luna has been using the infinite scroll, the short videos, the dopamine loops — not in the waking world, but in dreams. Those who sleep too deeply never wake up. The dream gives them everything the phone once did.
